description: A customer scheduled a bill payment but now needs to cancel it before it is sent.

nodes.task_description: Identify the customer and locate the scheduled bill payment.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds the upcoming payment to the utility company.

nodes.task_description: Verify that the payment has not yet been processed.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms the payment is still in 'Scheduled' status.

nodes.task_description: Cancel the scheduled payment and confirm the cancellation.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully cancels the payment and informs the customer.
